presets.name: Paper

presets.name: Print
presets.author: bmf
presets.description: No progress bar. Alternating page number, odd/even title + author and chapter + series.

presets.name: Rich detail
presets.author: AndyHazz
presets.description: Clock, battery, Wi-Fi, brightness, highlights — the full kitchen sink

presets.name: Simple UI (book and chapter)

presets.name: SimpleUI status bar
presets.author: AndyHazz
presets.description: Compact top-right status bar in the simpleui style

presets.description: Session timer, reading speed, time remaining, progress percentages

presets.name: Wow
